name: Don Hunstein
abstract: Donald Robert Hunstein (November 19, 1928 – March 18, 2017) was an American photographer.

about_quotes.speaker: Delfeayo Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: I saw the 100 great jazz records. There was a picture of Kind of Blue session by Don Hunstein.
about_quotes.doc_title: Delfeayo Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
